trigger.Name: FirstLook_cin
trigger.script:

god(1)
Fly("First_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 9, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 0, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 1, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 2, 0.5 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 10001, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 2, 0.5 ) end
TActivate("FirstLook_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "FirstLook_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
trigger:Deactivate()
